sheet_name: Grid line master (สังเคราะห์เอง — ไม่ใช่หน้าจริงในเอกสาร ใช้ 'หน้า 0' เป็น convention สำหรับไฟล์ grid กลางของทั้งบ้าน)

image/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_02/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_02_หน้า32.png
note: 2-story house, small footprint similar to house #3 (8.50m x 10.00m). Grid confirmed identical on S-02 (spread footing plan) and S-03 (pile footing plan). Both sheets show a genuine dummy grid: a row of C0-marked footings (col1/col2 only) sitting 1.90m before/above the named grid E -- confirmed on both S-02 and S-03 independently (same offset, same C0 column mark), same kind of finding as house #3's bay-window dummy grid. Named grid E is the topmost/origin row per spec convention, so this extra row before it takes a NEGATIVE pos_m.

y_lines.source: S-02 and S-03, C0-marked footing/column row at col1 and col2 only (no col3), 1.90m before named grid E on both sheets. CONFIRMED_2026-07-16: column schedule S-09 (หน้า38_column_schedule.json) independently confirms C0 as a real short column (200x200 at ตอม่อ, terminating at ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 -- does not rise to floor 2 or roof), a 3rd independent structural sheet agreeing. The architecture floor plan (หน้า06) does NOT show a matching dimensioned zone at this exact 1.9m offset -- its own ~2.00m zone above gridE is explicitly noted as a different feature, not confirming or contradicting this dummy grid.

building_footprint_note: Full 3x5 grid of footings/columns present at every intersection (1-2-3 x E-D-C-B-A) on both S-02 and S-03, plus the E' dummy row (col1/col2 only, no col3), and row A is missing col1 (only col2/col3 present at row A). Column marks: C0 (dummy row E' only), C1A (perimeter corners), C1 (main grid), C2 (interior, col2 at rows D/C).
warnings: Not yet cross-checked against S-04/S-05 (column+beam plans) or the architecture floor plans -- come back and verify/extend once those are read.
Dummy grid E' is provisional pending architecture cross-check -- if the background architecture agent's floor plan shows no matching wall/room extension there, reconcile.
